% Add cover image to the auto-generated title page
\usepackage{titling}
\pretitle{\begin{center}\includegraphics[width=0.7\textwidth]{cover.png}\par\vspace{1.5cm}\Huge\bfseries}
\posttitle{\par\end{center}\vspace{0.5cm}}
\preauthor{\begin{center}\Large}
\postauthor{\par\end{center}}
\predate{\begin{center}\large}
\postdate{\par\end{center}}


\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage{polyglossia}
\setmainlanguage{spanish}

% =========================
% TIPOGRAFÍA
% =========================

\setmainfont{TeX Gyre Pagella} % evita problemas con € y mejora estética
\usepackage{microtype}

% =========================
% DISEÑO GENERAL
% =========================

\linespread{1.15}
\setlength{\parskip}{0.5em}
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}

% =========================
% ESPACIO ENTRE ECUACIONES
% =========================

\raggedbottom
\setlength{\abovedisplayskip}{10pt}
\setlength{\belowdisplayskip}{10pt}

% =========================
% CABECERAS (tipo libro)
% =========================

\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}

\fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}

\fancyhead[LE]{\leftmark}
\fancyhead[RO]{\rightmark}

% Cabeceras limpias

% =========================
% FORMATO DE CAPÍTULOS
% =========================

\usepackage{titlesec}

% Capítulos
\titleformat{\chapter}[display]
  {\normalfont\Huge\bfseries}
  {\chaptername\ \thechapter}
  {1em}
  {\raggedright}

% Secciones
\titleformat{\section}
  {\normalfont\Large\bfseries}
  {\thesection}{1em}{}

\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\normalfont\large\bfseries}
  {\thesubsection}{1em}{}

\titleformat{\subsubsection}
  {\normalfont\normalsize\bfseries}
  {\thesubsubsection}{1em}{}

% IMPORTANTE: evitar errores de Quarto
\titleformat{\paragraph}[runin]
  {\normalfont\normalsize\bfseries}
  {\theparagraph}{1em}{}

\titleformat{\subparagraph}[runin]
  {\normalfont\normalsize\bfseries}
  {\thesubparagraph}{1em}{}

% Espaciado consistente
\titlespacing*{\chapter}{0pt}{0pt}{20pt}
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{12pt}{6pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{10pt}{4pt}

% =========================
% NOMBRES EN ESPAÑOL
% =========================

\addto\captionsspanish{
}

% =========================
% BIBLIOGRAFÍA
% =========================

\usepackage{csquotes}
